name: mock-auth
description: Mock AI provider driver for core-auth — canned responses to validate the auth pipeline.
author: intisy

scripts.build: npx tsc --project core-auth/tsconfig.json && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js && npx esbuild src/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/handler.js
